app.name: CodeCloud
app.tagline: Gina, gudu, da kuma tura code daga ko'ina.
language.switcher.label: Yare
footer.tagline: Gina, gudu, da kuma tura code daga ko'ina. IDE na girgije don masu haɓaka zamani.
landing.hero.eyebrow: Cloud IDE don ƙungiyoyi na zamani
landing.hero.title: Lambar ko'ina. Jirgin ruwa a ko'ina.
landing.hero.subtitle: Cikakken yanayin ci gaba a cikin burauzar ku. Ikon AI, yana samuwa a cikin {{count}}+ harsuna.
errors.generic: Wani abun ya faru, da fatan za'a sake gwadawa
errors.network: Ba za a iya haɗawa da uwar garke ba.
errors.unauthorized: Dole ne a sanya hannu a ciki don yin wannan aikin.
errors.forbidden: Ba ku da izinin yin hakan.
errors.notFound: Ba mu iya samun abin da kuke nema ba.
errors.validation: Da fatan za a bincika filayen da aka haskaka kuma sake gwadawa.
errors.rateLimit: Tambayoyi da yawa. Don Allah a hankali.
errors.server: Kuskuren uwar garke. An sanar da ƙungiyarmu.
errors.payment: Ba za a iya sarrafa biyan kuɗin ku ba.
errors.auth.invalidCredentials: Imel mara inganci ko kalmar sirri.
errors.auth.emailTaken: Wannan imel an riga an yi rajista.
errors.auth.usernameTaken: Wannan sunan mai amfani ya riga ya ɗauki.
errors.auth.userNotFound: Mai amfani ba a samu ba.
email.welcome.subject: Barka da zuwa CodeCloud!
email.welcome.body: Barka dai {{name}}, maraba da zuwa CodeCloud! Fara coding a yau.
email.passwordReset.subject: Sake saita kalmar sirrin ku
email.passwordReset.body: Danna mahada don sake saita kalmar sirri. Wannan mahaɗin ya ƙare a {{expiresIn}}.
email.deploy.subject: {{project}} da aka tura
email.lowCredits.subject: Low credits gargadi
admin.i18n.title: Fassara ɗaukar hoto
admin.i18n.subtitle: Track fassara cika a fadin duk goyon locales.
